generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensingComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor measuring input current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderSensingComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor position encoder providing motor shaft angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoderSensingComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary gearbox encoder providing gearbox output angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance DerivedTorqueSensingComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Derived torque measurement calculated from current and motor parameters"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocitySensingComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity measurement calculated from encoder data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DerivedAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance DerivedAccelerationSensingComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Derived acceleration measurement calculated from velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DerivedAccelerationDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensingComponent
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensingComponent
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoderSensingComponent
]

instance DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DerivedTorqueSensingComponent
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DerivedAngularVelocitySensingComponent
]

instance DerivedAccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DerivedAccelerationSensingComponent
]

// C10: Data
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Streamed motor current measurements (I_M) received via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler, AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Streamed motor shaft angle measurements from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler, AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

instance GearboxEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Streamed gearbox output angle measurements from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler, AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Streamed derived torque values calculated on‑board"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler, AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Streamed derived angular velocity values calculated on‑board"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler, AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Streamed derived acceleration values calculated on‑board"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedAccelerationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler, AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers (Tooling & Enablers)
instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker used for real‑time data streaming from robot sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell providing semantic linking of streamed data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService, SimulationProcessingService
]

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool used for structural engineering models of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables EngineeringModelingService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for executable simulation of motor and gearbox models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationProcessingService, RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance CustomDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom web dashboard for visualizing friction identification results and model performance"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time friction identification (static, kinetic, viscous) using combined white‑box and black‑box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossInsight, UpdateFrictionParametersAction
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of friction loss, model outputs and performance metrics in an integrated dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossInsight, ModelPerformanceInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation and automatic feedback of updated friction parameters to the robot controller"
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateFrictionParametersAction
]

instance EngineeringModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Creation and maintenance of SysML engineering models describing structure and ports"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelPerformanceInsight
]

instance SimulationProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Execution of MATLAB/Simulink simulation models for motor, gearwheel and gearbox dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelPerformanceInsight
]

// C17: Insights
instance FrictionLossInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on real‑time friction loss identified from combined analytical and data‑driven models"
]

instance ModelPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on model performance by comparing simulated torque/velocity with measured data"
]

// C17: Actions
instance UpdateFrictionParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of friction parameters fed back to the robot controller to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C10: Models/Data (Engineering & Simulation)
instance EngineeringSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagrams describing the vertical axis structure and its ports"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance SimulationSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model of the motor, gearwheel and cycloidal gearbox with optional friction blocks"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance WhiteBoxFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical white‑box friction models (Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) implemented in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance BlackBoxFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Black‑box data‑driven friction model identified from measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "None; the digital shadow does not send commands or data back to the physical robot."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time synchronization with the live data stream, enabling on‑the‑fly model updating during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A single digital shadow instance (FrictionShadow) that ties together purpose (FrictionDerivation), asset (MABI axis), processing components (Simulation_M, Simulation_GW, Simulation_GB), models (engineering, simulation, data‑calculation) and data traces, all instantiated according to the Digital Shadow Reference Model."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operated stage – the digital shadow is created and used while the robot is in service to monitor and compensate friction changes over time."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of every data point to its source and processing model, use of both analytical (white‑box) and data‑driven (black‑box) friction models, and validation by comparing simulated outputs with measured reference data to detect deviations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Data are transmitted from the robot to the digital shadow over MQTT; the Asset Administration Shell provides metadata linking; no other protocols are specified."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The approach utilizes the Industry 4.0 Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard and standard modeling languages such as SysML and IEC‑based MQTT messaging."
]
